author: w3Lb
content: Plan: stream_one_file keeps  (BufReader over the input File) alive across tmp.persist(file_path). On Windows, MoveFileEx/ReplaceFile over a destination with an open handle fails with Access Denied (os error 5) — Unix rename doesn't care, which is why 25 local suites and Linux/macOS CI are green while both Windows streaming tests fail. Fix: drop(reader) immediately after the read loop, before backup/persist. Logically certain + harmless on Unix; can't run Windows locally, so verification = full local suite + the reasoning recorded here, then watch the Windows runner.
